Home.hero_subtitle: GRIFZ Studio designs premium digital identities, websites and experiences for demanding brands, companies and creatives.
Home.promise_bespoke_desc: Each project is designed as a unique piece, serving your vision and your brand.
Home.promise_materials_desc: A visual direction built around the material that represents your brand.
Home.promise_impact_desc: Digital experiences that clarify, reassure and leave a lasting impression.
Home.brand_subtitle: You can choose a material, or let us find it for you.

Catalogue.title: Materials Catalog
Catalogue.subtitle: Discover our essences through different collections. Click on the center cards to reveal their palettes.

About.title: The Studio.
About.intro: We are an independent design studio. We believe every brand possesses a fundamental material that dictates its rhythm, typography, interaction and credibility.
About.block1_text: We are not a website factory. We carefully select our projects (5 to 10 per month maximum) to guarantee total involvement and artisanal quality on every creation.
About.block2_text: We don't stop at web design. From visual identity to overall art direction, we sculpt your digital presence in a coherent, premium and lasting way.
About.block3_text: Our method always begins with selecting your material. Is it Glass, clinical and pure? Copper, warm and textured? Charcoal, raw and powerful? This choice dictates all our design decisions. Furthermore, we guarantee strict confidentiality on projects undergoing redesign.
About.teaser_text_1: A manifesto object from the GRIFZ universe.

Reservation.title: Book your free call.
Reservation.subtitle: 30 minutes to define the best material, the right scope and the digital direction suited to your brand.
Reservation.no_slots: No time slots available for this date.
Reservation.offers_subtitle: High-precision interventions to sculpt your presence.
Reservation.pack1_desc: Modernization and pure alignment of your logotype with your fundamental material.
Reservation.pack2_desc: Creation of a complete and coherent color, typographic and iconographic system.
Reservation.pack3_desc: From deep logo creation to digital and print communication materials.
Reservation.pack4_desc: Premium website creation, total art direction and complete digital strategy.
